Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This patch seems like it could be moved earlier in the series, so that it could land earlier?  Having non-recursive migrate would be useful even on b2_12.

It looks like this is also failing tests due to the previous patch(es).

Abandoned

the latest dir restripe code doesn't need this, abandon it for now, and it can be pushed on another ticket later.

parents.subject: LU-11025 dne: refactor dir migration code

commit.subject: LU-11025 dne: support non-recursive mode migration
commit.message:
LU-11025 dne: support non-recursive mode migration

Add an option to migrate directory in non-recursive mode, but it's
not enabled currently for backward compatibility, later directory
restripe will be done in this mode by default.

Signed-off-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I00bb9b1f5b8fab20002cc3ccdfb60dce8d3c7df2
